ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "poll_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling organization or report */,
  "poll_date" TEXT /* Date range during which the poll was conducted */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of respondents surveyed */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the poll results */,
  "rounds" REAL /* Number of polling rounds conducted */,
  "weiland_score" REAL /* Weiland score indicating the polling methodology score */,
  "pressler_score" REAL /* Pressler score indicating the polling methodology score */,
  "raw_spread" TEXT /* Raw spread of polling results compared to previous polls */,
  "ppd_spread" TEXT /* PPD spread of polling results */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polling organization */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polling method used */,
  "poll_type" TEXT /* Type of poll (e.g., general election, primary) */,
  "poll_status" TEXT /* Status of the poll (e.g., active, completed, archived) */,
  "poll_description" TEXT /* Description of the poll */,
  "geographical_scope" TEXT /* Geographical area covered by the poll */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the poll was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the poll was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES polling_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES polling_organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries regarding the organization */,
  "organization_description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the organization was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the organization's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample demographic entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll related to this sample */,
  "demographic" TEXT /* Demographic category (e.g., age group, gender) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage representation of this demographic in the sample */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Specific age range (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., Male, Female, Non-binary) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race or ethnicity */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., High School, College, Graduate) */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range (e.g., < $30K, $30K-$60K) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the sample was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the sample record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_samples_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for polling method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling method (e.g., Phone, Online) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the polling method */,
  "method_accuracy" REAL /* Estimated accuracy of the polling method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the method was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the method's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling result entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll associated with the result */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate or issue being polled */,
  "support_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents supporting this candidate or issue */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue (if applicable) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or district where the poll was conducted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the result record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_results_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
